creator: thmu7@freenet.de
text:
Created attachment 254617
Fix build with boost 1.85.0

The attached patch based on this commit

  https://github.com/acaudwell/Gource/commit/79b967e0dc2a20725568492bc4fcab74a798a089

in the upstream gource repo can be used to unbreak the build with boost-libs-1.85.0.
